t_ch: 恕我难以苟同。那颗星球既没有加入信用体系，也没有连通银轨，是「同谐」庇护下的偏远文明…但匹诺康尼不一样。
t_en: I would disagree. Byari Skamandros is not part of the credit system or connected to the silver rail. It's nothing more than a remote civilization sheltered by the Harmony... But Penacony is different.

t_ch: 这么做意味着向全银河近半数的派系宣战，家族没有理由这么做。
t_en: If The Family messes with Penacony, that would be like declaring war on almost half of the factions in the Cosmos. They have no reason to do that.

t_ch: 前提是…他们真的心向「同谐」。
t_en: No, they don't... if they truly serve the Harmony, that is.

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 被笼罩在匹诺康尼光芒下的命途并不纯粹，这里的「同谐」中混入了杂质。
t_en: The Path in Penacony is impure. The Harmony here has impurities.

t_ch: 还记得那场古老的「寰宇蝗灾」么？「繁育」塔伊兹育罗斯给宇宙带来无尽浩劫，而这场浩劫最终却在混乱和迷茫中演变为列神之战。
t_en: Do you remember the ancient Swarm Disaster? Tayzzyronth the Propagation brought endless havoc to the universe, and it eventually evolved into a fierce battle among all Aeons.

t_ch: 共有两道命途在这场大战中失去了星神：「繁育」和「秩序」。巧合的是，这两道命途的转折都与某位星神有关……
t_en: Two Paths lost their Aeons in that war — the Propagation and the Order. Coincidentally, their downfall is related to a certain Aeon...

t_ch: …「同谐」的希佩。据说祂参与了列神对虫皇的讨伐，又出于不明原因吞纳了「秩序」太一。
t_en: ...Xipe the Harmony. Legend has it that THEY participated in the crusade against the Imperator Insectorum and devoured Ena the Order for unknown reasons.

t_ch: 他小宝贝的，好家伙…你们是想说可能是两道无主的命途在暗中捣鬼？
t_en: Holy forkeroni... So, you're saying that the two leaderless Paths are working behind the scenes?

t_ch: 可匹诺康尼并未出现「繁育」的子嗣。我可否理解为是「天外合唱班」的残党潜伏于家族中，并且想要复活一位陨落的星神？
t_en: But I don't see any descendants of the Propagation in Penacony. Could it be that the remnants of Beyond the Sky Choir are hiding within The Family, trying to resurrect a fallen Aeon?

t_ch: 尚不能断定，但至少能确定他们准备利用「谐乐大典」做些什么。
t_en: I can't say for sure, but they're definitely planning something for the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 我了个呜呜伯，这么复杂啊。那你要求我们立刻离开阿斯德纳的意思是？不会是没辙了吧？
t_en: Holy Wubbaboo! This is getting way too complicated. Is this why you want us to leave Asdana right away? Are you giving up?

t_ch: 谐乐大典开幕在即，有一件事…我无论如何都需要求证。跃迁是最有效的手段。
t_en: The Charmony Festival will start soon. There's one thing that... I need to confirm no matter what. A warp jump is the best way to do so.

t_ch: 不，正因为时间紧迫……
t_en: Time is running out...

t_ch: 我会立即动用其他手段。
t_en: I have another plan.

t_ch: 你不会是要用「结盟玉兆」吧！
t_en: Hold on, are you thinking of using the Jade Abacus of Allying Oath?

t_ch: 正是。有罗浮云骑支援…应当够了。
t_en: Exactly. The assistance from the Luofu Cloud Knights... would be enough.

t_ch: 那东西一辈子只能用一次，你最好想清楚了。
t_en: Think it over carefully. You can only use that once in your lifetime.

t_ch: 我想清楚了。我的伙伴们…也是一辈子只能拥有一次的。
t_en: I have considered it thoroughly. My companions are... They're also once-in-a-lifetime treasures.

t_ch: 在这里的只有你么，孩子？
t_en: Are you the only one here, my child?

t_ch: 那无名客确有一手，我等的{RUBY_B#「秩序」}秘密{RUBY_E#}已在家系间不胫而走，公司的星舰也在向阿斯德纳集结……
t_en: The Nameless is quite the diplomat. Our {RUBY_B#Order}secrets{RUBY_E#} have spread like wildfire within The Family, and IPC starships are gathering towards Asdana...

t_ch: 眼下正是关键时刻，试问，那位调和众音的{RUBY_B#知更鸟}神选者{RUBY_E#}在哪里？
t_en: This is a crucial moment for us. So, where is the {RUBY_B#Robin}chosen one{RUBY_E#} who harmonizes the varied sounds?

t_ch: 这是什么话，先生？
t_en: What do you mean, Master?

t_ch: 我不是正好端端地站在你面前么？
t_en: I'm right here in front of you, aren't I?

t_ch: 你知道，在我们的计划中，她才是谐乐大典的主角。
t_en: You know, she was supposed to be the star of the Charmony Festival in our plan.

t_ch: 可计划有变。身为她的兄长，我知道为「秩序」献唱必不是她的本愿。这里有我足矣。
t_en: But the plan has changed. As her brother, I know she doesn't want to sing for the Order, so I'll take her place.

t_ch: 呵。你从小就智慧过人，想必一定明白，自己此刻的作为要付出何种代价。
t_en: Heh, you've always been wise beyond your years. I'm sure you understand the consequences of your choice.

t_ch: 如果您认为这是一场「背叛」……
t_en: If you consider this a betrayal...

t_ch: 天无二日。如有必要，我会出手将太阳击落。
t_en: Well, there can't be two suns in the sky. I'll step up and take down the other sun if necessary.

t_ch: 你相信报应吗？
t_en: Do you believe in karma?

t_ch: 如果报应真的存在，那么众生皆有报应——你有你的，我也有我的。
t_en: If karma exists, then everyone has their own karma. You have yours, and I have mine.

t_ch: 而我的报应与你无关，歌斐木先生。
t_en: And my karma has nothing to do with you, Mr. Gopher Wood.

t_ch: 无妨。既然你愿意代她牺牲，那我就成全你吧。
t_en: Alright, since you're willing to sacrifice yourself for her, I'll grant your wish.

t_ch: 让步比我预想中来得更快。为什么？
t_en: Well, the compromise came sooner than expected. Why?

t_ch: 你们生来便是「秩序」的双子，命运注定会有一人踏上这条道路，抵达应至的结局。
t_en: You and your sister were born as twins of the Order, and one of you is destined to follow this path to the end.

t_ch: 这也在您的设计之中么？
t_en: Is this part of your plan?

t_ch: 当然，你还是和小时候一样聪明。
t_en: Of course. You're still as clever as you were when you were a child.

t_ch: 开幕的时刻近了。去吧，孩子。窃夺「同谐」的权柄，揭晓你的报应。
t_en: The opening is near. Go, my child. Seize the power of the Harmony and reveal your karma.

t_ch: 先生，我还有最后一个问题。
t_en: I have one final question, Master.

t_ch: 为何您会选择让「秩序」降临在匹诺康尼？一个走投无路的世界理应会是更好的选择，可您还是选择了这么一座人们心中怀有自由的梦想之城。为什么？
t_en: Why did you choose to bring the Order to Penacony? Wouldn't it have been better to choose a desperate world instead of a city filled with hope and dreams? Why?

t_ch: 为了公平，孩子。
t_en: It's for justice, my child.

t_ch: 失去心中的公义，我们便会重蹈「同谐」的覆辙。
t_en: If we lose justice in our hearts, we'll make the same mistake as the Harmony did.

t_ch: 所以，利用「星核」操纵梦境的人果真不是您，而是——
t_en: So, it's not you who manipulates the Dreamscape with the Stellaron, but...

t_ch: 我们言尽于此。动手吧，橡木家系的十万七千三百三十六道灵魂已梦见这一刻太多次了……
t_en: Well, that's where our conversation ends. Go ahead. The <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> souls of the Oak Family have dreamed of this moment too many times...

t_ch: 「我将飞上高空，变作天上的太阳。」
t_en: "I shall ascend to the heavens, becoming the scorching sun."

t_ch: 「万众在我的光芒中热烈生长，而一切罪恶将无所遁形。」
t_en: "Bathed in my light, my people shall flourish, while all evil shall be eradicated."

t_ch: 这就是匹诺康尼大剧院的内部了。
t_en: This is the interior of the Penacony Grand Theater.

t_ch: 被汽水冲上天的感觉还挺刺激。不过…谐乐大典都要开始了，怎么还没开放入场啊？
t_en: It's quite exhilarating to be flushed into the air by SoulGlad, but... why is the venue still closed when the Charmony Festival is about to start?

t_ch: 不仅如此，这整座剧场也安静得出奇。不仅没有观众，连工作和演职人员都没看到……
t_en: And not only that, the entire theater is eerily quiet. No audience, no staff, no one around...

t_ch: 会不会是来晚了？
t_en: Are we too late?

t_ch: 就算我们来晚了，这么大的剧院也不可能空无一人。
t_en: Even if we're late, a grand theater like this shouldn't be completely empty.

t_ch: 看来「谐乐大典」票房不佳啊！
t_en: Looks like the Charmony Festival was a flop at the box office!

t_ch: 是哦，一个人都没有…你的关注点不对吧！
t_en: Yeah, I wonder how many tickets... Hey, that's not what we should be concerned about!

t_ch: 我们先四处探探吧。各位，小心前进。
t_en: Let's explore around. Be careful, everyone.

t_ch: 天哪，这大剧院的气氛也太诡异了，好瘆人啊……
t_en: Gosh, the atmosphere here is so creepy and unsettling...

t_ch: 就算观众没有入场，也总该有场务吧，怎么一点声音都没有……
t_en: Even if there's no audience yet, there should be some staff around. Why is it so silent...?

t_ch: 「不妨就从这天地初开讲起吧——」
t_en: "Let us commence with the dawning of the world..."

t_ch: 「自黄昏战争以降，天穹空虚，大地混沌。」
t_en: "After the Dusk Wars, darkness veiled the sky, and chaos consumed the earth."

t_ch: 「为教天地万物归于可知，『秩序』太一降生。」
t_en: "Ena the Order emerged, destined to restore all existence."

t_ch: 「这便是头一日。」
t_en: "That marked the first day."

t_ch: 「祂采星云作成羽拨，造了有黑白键的大琴。」
t_en: "THEY gathered nebulae and forged them into picks, thus creating a grand lyre with black and white keys."

t_ch: 「击打白键，太阳升起，击打黑键，月亮升起。」
t_en: "Strike the white keys, and the sun rose. Strike the black keys, and the moon rose."

t_ch: 「如此三十又一日，三个轮转为休止，复又敲击四个等程。」
t_en: "Thus, thirty-one days a cycle, three cycles a solstice, and four solstices marked the passage of time."

t_ch: 「昼夜就这样成了。这便是第二日。」
t_en: "And so, the cycle of day and night arose. That marked the second day."

t_ch: 大剧院的舞台怎么成这样了？
t_en: What happened to the Grand Theater stage?

t_ch: 人偶都聚集在画框周围，是想让我们进去么？
t_en: The puppets are gathering around the frame. Are they expecting us to enter it?

t_ch: 「诸位是远道而来的客人，我终究不希望刀兵相见。所以在一切变得无法挽回前，我安排了三出剧目。」
t_en: "I genuinely wish to avoid a violent clash with my esteemed guests from afar. Therefore, I've arranged three acts before the situation becomes irreparable."

t_ch: 「故事该从哪里开始呢，就从『匹诺康尼』还是『边陲监狱』的时候开始吧。」
t_en: "Where shall we start our narrative? Well, let's start with the time when Penacony was still a frontier prison."

t_ch: 「这里曾经是逼仄的囚牢。但我们要让它变成自由的乐园。」
t_en: "This place was once a place of confinement, but we will turn it into a haven of freedom."

t_ch: 「琥珀历<unbreak>2147</unbreak>纪，囚犯哈努努掀起了声势浩大的战火，并获得胜利。公司称其为『边陲战争』，而阿斯德纳人称其为『独立战争』」。
t_en: "In <unbreak>2147</unbreak> AE, a prisoner named Hanunue ignited a struggle for liberty and emerged triumphant. IPC referred to it as the 'War of the Frontier,' while the Asdanians dubbed it the 'War of Independence.'"

t_ch: 「囚笼被粉碎了！狱卒被驱逐了！可我们…又该去哪里？」
t_en: "We've shattered the cages and expelled the guards! But... where shall we go?"

t_ch: 「哈努努先生是一位伟人。但我们不应讳言，他能够带给囚徒自由，却不知晓如何给予他们真正的自由。」
t_en: "It's true that Hanunue was a legendary hero, but it must be acknowledged that while he bestowed freedom upon the prisoners, he didn't grant them true liberation."

t_ch: 「可敬的旅人，感谢你们留下。可你也无法驱逐那些狱卒，即便他们早已不在阿斯德纳。」
t_en: "Thank you for staying here, honorable travelers. However, not even you could banish the guards, though they are no longer in Asdana."

t_ch: 「三位无名客留在此地，试图向边陲监狱传递『开拓』的教益，但可惜，无济于事。」
t_en: "The three Nameless stayed on the planet, endeavoring to spread the tenets of Trailblaze throughout the frontier prison. Alas, their efforts proved futile."

t_ch: 「我们应当再造一个囚笼，不在这世上，而在人心中。只要我们不使他们自由，便永远不会流离失所。」
t_en: "Let's build another prison, not within the physical world, but within their minds. As long as we keep them imprisoned, they will always have a sanctuary."

t_ch: 「阿斯德纳再度被战火席卷，这次的敌人来自内部。囚徒至死仍是囚徒，只知为自由而战，不知为自由而生。」
t_en: "Once again, Asdana was engulfed in war, this time the enemies originating from within. The prisoners remained prisoners for the rest of their lives, fighting for freedom rather than living for it."

t_ch: 怎么看个戏还要打架啊！
t_en: Hey, why do we have to fight while enjoying the show?

t_ch: 「因为我不止想要诸位欣赏这出剧目，还希望你们…帮助我完成它。」
t_en: "For I desire not only your enjoyment but also your... assistance in its completion."

t_ch: 这些人偶…又想让我们去哪儿？
t_en: These puppets... Where are they guiding us this time?

t_ch: 「祂撷星流制成笔尖，拟了发音和计数的符号。」
t_en: "THEY transmuted streams of stars into inked nibs, creating symbols to be pronounced and counted."

t_ch: 「祂使星尘汇成河流，指认那善与义的在上游，那恶与不义的在下游。」
t_en: "THEY molded stardust into flowing rivers, assigning the righteous upstream and the unjust downstream."

t_ch: 「万物自此蒙受各自的记号，世人自此得以知晓善恶与利害。」
t_en: "Thus, all things were marked, and the world learned to discern between good and evil."

t_ch: 「这便是第三日与第四日。」
t_en: "That marked the third and fourth days."

t_ch: 看，又是一个画框……
t_en: Look, another frame...

t_ch: 「接下来的故事围绕着权力斗争。树、草、花、鸟、兽、果、虫七大家系在匹诺康尼一一落成。」
t_en: "Behold the ensuing tale, a struggle for power. Penacony witnessed the ascent of the seven major lineages — Tree, Grass, Flower, Bird, Beast, Fruit, and Insect."

t_ch: 「和平从未真正降临在流放之地。这段历史千头万绪，太过复杂，请允许我用寓言的方式向诸位呈现。」
t_en: "Peace never truly graced land of the exiles. The history in this era is rich and intricate, so please allow me to present it in allegorical form."

t_ch: 「欢迎来到这幢宅邸，外来的宾客。它的建立者已被下人驱逐，而七位仆人都认为自己能取代旧日的主人。」
t_en: "Welcome to this mansion, dear outsiders. Its founder has been exiled by those beneath them, and now the seven servants believe they can replace their former master."

t_ch: 「流放之地的秩序十分混乱，又有内忧外患虎视眈眈。七大家系表面统一，实则各自为政，纷争不断。」
t_en: "Land of the exiles was in disarray, besieged by both internal and external perils. Though the seven major lineages appeared united on the surface, each harbored their own ambitions, leading to ceaseless conflict."

t_ch: 「会计！你我是宅邸的基柱，曾经盟誓团结一致，永不背弃——你为何要杀我？」
t_en: "Accountant! We are the pillars of this mansion, bound by an oath of loyalty and unity... Why are you plotting my downfall?"

t_ch: 「因为主人用泥土造化了你，用烈火造化了我，我比你更高贵！」
t_en: "Because Master shaped you from clay but forged me from fire! I'm superior to you!"

t_ch: 「最先退出内战的是黑布林家系，在苜蓿草家系策划的『白色沙漠』事件中，他们永远成为了历史。」
t_en: "The Blackplum Family was the first to fall. They withered away in the White Desert event orchestrated by the Alfalfa Family."

t_ch: 「孩子，你不曾为旧主效命，而不清楚他的威能。他能夺走我们自由，便也能赐予我们自由。」
t_en: "My child, you did not serve the old master and know not of his power. Just as he can strip us of our freedom, he can also grant it to us."

t_ch: 「苜蓿草的家主意图投靠公司，用自由换取生存，却被长子大义灭亲，而后者接任了家主之席。」
t_en: "The leader of the Alfalfa Family sought to defect to the IPC, trading freedom for survival. However, his eldest son slew him in the name of righteousness and ascended as the new family head."

t_ch: 「与蜂共舞者，必遭蜂毒所害。我早已知晓我的命运，这一天早晚会到来。」
t_en: "Those who dance with bees are bound to fall victim to their stings. I have long foreseen my fate, and this moment is inevitable."

t_ch: 「银河残酷而无情，灯蛾家系试图开垦列车留下的银轨，却遭遇虫群余孽，惨遭覆灭。」
t_en: "The Lampmoth Family endeavored to extend the silver rail left by the Express, only to be eradicated by the remnants of the Swarm, leaving nothing in the unforgiving Cosmos."

t_ch: 「而我——我将成为诸位新的家人，并将你们从死去的幻影中解放。」
t_en: "As for me... I shall forge new bonds of Kinship and liberate you from the clutches of death."

t_ch: 「直到歌斐木带领家族来到流放之地，五大家系先后皈依，匹诺康尼才得以拥抱它的新名——梦想之地。」
t_en: "Only when Gopher Wood led The Family to land of the exiles and earned recognition from all five major lineages did Penacony earn its new name, the Land of the Dreams."

t_ch: 听，整个阿斯德纳都在下雪！天空摇摇欲坠，大地积重难返。银色宇宙的尽头——朝阳冒出了初生的芽！
t_en: Listen, snow blankets all of Asdana! The sky trembles, and the earth teeters on the brink of collapse. At the edge of the silver universe, the first buds sprout under the rising sun!

t_ch: 「祂拾星环陈明法度，同人群立了行事的典章。」
t_en: "THEY used the planetary rings to establish the law, forging a code of conduct among the masses."

t_ch: 「以有黑白键的大琴为乐器；以发音和计数的符号为音符；以有下行无上行的河流作旋律；以陈明法度的典章定曲式。」
t_en: "A grand lyre with black and white keys served as an instrument, while symbols of articulation and numerical notation took the form of musical notes. The downward-flowing river became a melody, and the canon of law dictated the form."

t_ch: 「世人遂在乐章中找准唯一的位置，这便是第五日与第六日。」
t_en: "Thus, all mortals found their unique place within this symphony. That marked the fifth and sixth days."

t_ch: 他真的好喜欢用这些人偶来引导啊。
t_en: This guy is really into these puppets.

t_ch: 「这是最后一幕戏了。我已向诸位展现了匹诺康尼的过去与现在，并衷心希望你们能理解我究竟为何要改变现状。」
t_en: "This is the concluding act of this play. I have showcased the past and present of Penacony, hoping that my desire for change resonates within you."

t_ch: 「而接下来，我将为诸位揭示——匹诺康尼的未来。」
t_en: "And now, I shall reveal its future to you."

t_ch: 「我从无限延伸的螺旋阶梯，向着未来缓缓坠落。不必恒久地记住我，或试图将我寻获。我心中的轮廓，必将与其他经验交错。」
t_en: "Descending from the infinite spiral staircase, I traverse towards the future with measured steps. No need to remember me or seek my existence, for the contours of my mind shall intersect with other experiences."

t_ch: 「祂赐了世间众人『意义』，天地万物都造齐了。祂歇了一切创造的工。」
t_en: "THEY imbued the world with meaning, perfecting all things in the heavens and on earth. Then, THEY rested from the labors of creation."

t_ch: 「然而，众生复向太一呼告：『你以「秩序」为万民定义，却令我等晓得自己不过是你的傀儡！』」
t_en: "Yet, all beings cried out to Ena — 'Under the banner of the Order, you have defined all things in the Cosmos... but this made us realize that we are but puppets in your hands!'"

t_ch: 「故在那日，万众集结一心，将神投入毁灭坑中。」
t_en: "Thus, on that day, all beings united and cast the Aeon into the abyss of oblivion."

t_ch: 「这便是第七日。」
t_en: "That marked the seventh day."

t_ch: 「欢呼颂唱遂齐声响起——」
t_en: "Cheers and chants reverberated in unison..."

t_ch: 普世同谐，群星共熠，无上功德颂神主！
t_en: The world is in harmony and the stars shine bright. Praise the Great One!

t_ch: 秩序已死！秩序已死！秩序已死！
t_en: The Order is dead! The Order is dead! The Order is dead!

t_ch: 妈呀——吓我一跳！这售票处怎么有这么多…人偶？
t_en: Yikes! They scared the life out of me! Why are there so many... puppets at the ticket office?

t_ch: 它们不会突然动起来吧？
t_en: They won't suddenly start moving, will they?

t_ch: 哎呀，你快别说了！
t_en: Aaah! Stop it!

t_ch: 好多模特啊，这是时装店？
t_en: So many mannequins! Is this a fashion store or something?

t_ch: 亏你还有心思开玩笑……
t_en: Can't believe you're in the mood to crack jokes...

t_ch: 三、三月…你的背后…
t_en: M—March... b—behind you...

t_ch: 什…什么！你好讨厌啊！别吓人家嘛！
t_en: Wh—What...? Ah! You're so annoying! Stop scaring me!

t_ch: 这些人偶是舞台上的布景吗？可即便如此，连前厅都完全不见人影，有些太过异常了。
t_en: Are these puppets part of the stage setup? Even so, it's so eerie that the entire front hall is empty.

t_ch: 我还真怕它们突然动起来…快离开吧！求你了！
t_en: I'm seriously scared they might start moving... Let's just leave, please!

t_ch: 我有种奇怪的预感，我们不会是走错地方了吧？
t_en: Something feels off... We're in the right place, right?

t_ch: 这梦境里应该也没有第二个「大剧院」了。
t_en: There's no other Grand Theater in the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 那就是星期日在晃点我们？说好了在舞台上一决胜负，怎么人都没了？
t_en: So, Sunday is messing with us? He said we'd have a final showdown on the stage, but why is there no one here?

t_ch: 「抱歉，让你久等了，三月七小姐。」
t_en: "My apologies for the delay, March 7th."

t_ch: 吓我一跳！你…你在哪儿说话呢？
t_en: You scared me! Wh—Where... are you now?

t_ch: 「我就在幕布后方等待各位。在盛典开场前，遵循阿斯德纳的古老传统，我想邀请诸位一同观赏三出幕前剧。」
t_en: "I'm waiting for you behind the curtain. Following the Asdana tradition, I invite you to enjoy a stage play in three acts before the Festival begins."

t_ch: 「历史是面镜子，它映照出宇宙最本真的面貌。我们也可借这个机会，更深入地了解匹诺康尼和星神的历史。」
t_en: "History is a mirror reflecting the universe's true essence. Let's use this opportunity to delve into the rich history of Penacony and the Aeons."

t_ch: 「而未来的轮廓——自然就在其中显现。」
t_en: "Within it, naturally, the future takes shape."

t_ch: 不对，不是这个画框，是那个有很多人偶围着的。
t_en: No, not this frame. It's the one surrounded by puppets.

t_ch: 咱们这是到什么地方了？
t_en: Where are we now?

t_ch: 这地方的氛围…和星期日的内心世界很像。也许这所谓的「幕前剧」也是相似的能力。
t_en: The atmosphere here... looks similar to Sunday's inner world. Perhaps this so-called "stage play" is created with his abilities.

t_ch: 这出剧目名叫《囚人颂》，结合周边的氛围…恐怕接下来要上演的是匹诺康尼的过去。
t_en: This act is named Ode to Prisoner. Given the atmosphere here... I believe it's about Penacony's past.

t_ch: 最近几次开拓之旅都没进监狱，我还以为自己时来运转了呢！结果还是难逃此劫……
t_en: I thought things were finally looking up as I managed to dodge prison during my recent trailblazing expeditions! But now it looks like I'll be back behind bars again...

t_ch: 「希望你喜欢这片焦土之上的——自由之地。」
t_en: "I hope you like this land of freedom... on a scorched earth."

t_ch: 「看吧，他们的刑期早已结束，公司的狱卒也已被驱逐。可这些囚犯仍是奴隶之身，因为囚禁他们的不是外物，而是内心。」
t_en: "As you can see, their sentences have long ended, and the IPC guards have long been expelled. Yet, these prisoners remain enslaved, not by external forces, but by the confines of their own minds."

t_ch: 「自由存在于任何地方，唯独不存在于软弱的灵魂。它襄助不了任何人，只能襄助信它存在的人。」
t_en: "Freedom permeates every corner except fragile souls. It gives solace only to those who believe in its existence."

t_ch: 「囚徒们啊！我命令你们学会自由，并教会你们的兄弟——为生而战！」
t_en: "Prisoners! This is my order! Learn the essence of freedom and teach your fellow prisoners to fight for their lives!"

t_ch: 「已经不再有人能阻断你们的道路，你们自由了。」
t_en: "No one can restrain you any more! You are free!"

t_ch: 「至此便是第一幕。盛燃的战火中，『边陲监狱』逐渐走向『流放之地』。」
t_en: "Thus concludes the first act. Amidst a raging war, the frontier prison headed toward becoming Land of the Exiles."

t_ch: 这大概就是匹诺康尼的建成史。囚犯们在外来者的帮助下，终于走向自由，建立起了宇宙中的「流放之地」。
t_en: This must be how Penacony was constructed. With the aid of outsiders, the prisoners were finally liberated and established the Land of the Exiles.

t_ch: 只是比起肉体的囚笼，星期日似乎更侧重于表达人们精神的困境。
t_en: However, it appears that Sunday aims to convey the spiritual plight of the prisoners more than the physical aspects of imprisonment.

t_ch: 这戏剧对我来说有点太文艺了，最好懂的反而是打架的部分…不过可算是到出口了，我们快走吧！
t_en: Ah, this show is a bit too literary for my taste, but the battle part is quite easy to understand... Anyway, we've arrived at the exit. Let's go!

t_ch: 《愚仆颂》…想必这就是第二出剧目了。
t_en: Ode to Fool... This must be the second act.

t_ch: 环境也和刚才不一样了。周围的陈设…似乎变得整齐了些？
t_en: The surroundings are different from before. The stage decorations... look a bit tidier now?

t_ch: 「外来的宾客，我请求你帮助这间宅子，摆脱潜藏的教唆者的毒害。」
t_en: "Dear outsider, I beseech your aid in purging this mansion of the poison spread by the lurking instigators."

t_ch: 呃…帮助你们？需要做些什么？
t_en: Uh... You want us to help you? What do you need?

t_ch: 「我希望他们都能恢复理性的镇静，不再受到虚伪的操控。」
t_en: "I wish they could regain their reason and cast away the shackles of hypocrisy."

t_ch: 看起来，这第二幕讲的是匹诺康尼走向「梦想之地」的过程，而家族的到来在其中发挥了不可或缺的作用。
t_en: This is the second act. Looks like it's about Penacony's journey to becoming the Land of the Dreams, during which The Family plays a crucial role.

t_ch: 可这位「新至的主人」…怎么感觉不是什么好东西？
t_en: But this New Master... seems like a bad guy to me, don't you think?

t_ch: 这或许就是星期日暗藏在文脉下的内容——「同谐」改变了匹诺康尼，但做法却与过去的狱卒无异。
t_en: Perhaps this is the truth Sunday is trying to express, if you read between lines. The Harmony changed Penacony just as the guards once did.

t_ch: 那听起来，就是得让这几个跪拜的家伙全都变得「镇静」，对吧？
t_en: Looks like we've got to help those guys kneeling down over there calm down a bit, right?

t_ch: 「外来的宾客呀，你要往何处去？」
t_en: "Where are you headed, dear outsider?"

t_ch: 看来在完成这出剧目前，它是不会让我们离开的。
t_en: Guess we won't be able to leave until this act is complete.

t_ch: 「我希望他们都能恢复理性的<color=#dbc291ff>镇静</color>，不再受到虚伪的操控。」新至的主人如是说。
t_en: "I wish they could {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>calm down</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>regain their reason</color>{RUBY_E#} and cast away the shackles of hypocrisy," proclaimed the new master.

t_ch: 「惟有<color=#dbc291ff>理性</color>才能令其免于过去的流毒。」新至的主人如是说。
t_en: "Only {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>calmness</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>reason</color>{RUBY_E#} can shield people from the lingering poison of the past," proclaimed the new master.

t_ch: 「惟有<color=#dbc291ff>理性</color>才能令其免于过去的流毒。」新至的主人如是说。
t_en: "Only {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>calmness</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>reason</color>{RUBY_E#} can shield people from the lingering poison of the past," proclaimed the new master.

t_ch: 「<color=#dbc291ff>镇定</color>者方能避免潜藏的教唆者的毒害。」新至的主人如是说。
t_en: "Only the <color=#dbc291ff>calmed</color> ones can evade the insidious influence of the hidden instigator," proclaimed the new master.

t_ch: 「非<color=#dbc291ff>宁静</color>无以于死去的幻影中解放。」新至的主人如是说。
t_en: "In the absence of <color=#dbc291ff>calmness</color>, there exists no path to liberation from the clutches of death," proclaimed the new master.

t_ch: 「腐朽的人心惟有从<color=#dbc291ff>沉静</color>的旋律中焕发新生。」新至的主人如是说。
t_en: "The decaying human heart finds rebirth only within the <color=#dbc291ff>calmness</color>," proclaimed the new master.

t_ch: 距「谐乐大典」开幕1系统时
t_en: 1 system hour until Charmony Festival

t_ch: 根据第二幕的经验，你恐怕需要再次利用「钟表把戏」亲手完成剧目了。
t_en: Based on the experience from Act II, it seems you'll need to employ the clockwork once again to personally bring the performance to fruition.

t_ch: 距「谐乐大典」开幕<unbreak>10</unbreak>系统时 现实「白日梦」酒店
t_en: <unbreak>10</unbreak> system hours until Charmony Festival - The Reverie Hotel (Reality)

t_ch: 距「谐乐大典」开幕9系统时 黄金的时刻
t_en: 9 system hours until Charmony Festival - Golden Hour

t_ch: 距「谐乐大典」开幕8系统时 流梦礁
t_en: 8 system hours until Charmony Festival - Dreamflux Reef

t_ch: 一段时间前……
t_en: A while ago...

t_ch: 距「谐乐大典」开幕4系统时 星穹列车
t_en: 4 system hours until Charmony Festival - Astral Express

t_ch: 距「谐乐大典」开幕3系统时 匹诺康尼大剧院
t_en: 3 system hours until Charmony Festival - Penacony Grand Theater

t_ch: 距「谐乐大典」开幕2系统时 同一地点
t_en: 2 system hours until Charmony Festival - Same Location

t_ch: 距「谐乐大典」开幕1系统时
t_en: 1 system hour until Charmony Festival

t_ch: 「我要么是自己的主人，要么去迎回旧主，断然没有服从于新主的道理！」
t_en: "Either I shall be my own master, or I shall return to my former master! I shall not submit to a new master under any circumstances!"

t_ch: 「若是没有主人，又有谁还能赐我自由呢？」
t_en: "Without a master, who can grant me true freedom?"

t_ch: 这人偶好像没反应诶…你是不是弄错了？
t_en: This puppet isn't responding at all... Did something go wrong?

t_ch: 「主人！您终将归来！而我将永远守望，直到您因我的忠诚而嘉奖于我！」
t_en: "Master! Hope you will return in due course! And I shall stand vigilant, awaiting the reward for my loyalty!"

t_ch: 「主人，您已不在，我便不再等待您的嘉奖…所有一切应属我的，我当自取。」
t_en: "Master, now that you have gone, I shall wait no longer for my reward... I shall seize what is rightfully mine."

t_ch: 这人偶好像没反应诶…你是不是弄错了？
t_en: This puppet isn't responding at all... Did something go wrong?

t_ch: 「主人已不在，我本当自由，可没有主人的号令，我只得问道于盲。」
t_en: "Master is no longer here. I thought I'd be free, but I'm not. Now without my master's command, I'll have to seek guidance from the blind."

t_ch: 「主人已不在，我便不再有自己的主人。我应寻找新的主人，并为之效忠。」
t_en: "Master is no longer here. I must seek a new master and serve them faithfully."

t_ch: 这人偶好像没反应诶…你是不是弄错了？
t_en: This puppet isn't responding at all... Did something go wrong?

t_ch: 「我曾是所有仆人中最忠诚的卫士！主人遭驱逐后，我自当代他执掌万民的权柄！」
t_en: "Once, I stood as the most loyal guard among all the servants! Now, with my master banished, it's my right to assume control of his dominion!"

t_ch: 「过去的主人早已不在，我为何仍在畏惧众人构造的残影？」
t_en: "My former master has long departed, but why do I still fear the remnants of his creation?"

t_ch: 这人偶好像没反应诶…你是不是弄错了？
t_en: This puppet isn't responding at all... Did something go wrong?

t_ch: 「若主人不再归来，我便是自由的。但若没有主人的指引，我又该为谁歌唱？」
t_en: "In the absence of my master I am free, but without their guidance, for whom shall I sing?"

t_ch: 「我应为我的新主歌唱，正如祂高贵的声音，也曾为银河而响。」
t_en: "I shall sing for my new master, just as THEIR noble voice once resonated throughout the Cosmos."

t_ch: 这人偶好像没反应诶…你是不是弄错了？
t_en: This puppet isn't responding at all... Did something go wrong?

t_ch: 「感谢你们，外来的宾客！现在仆人都取回了自己的理性。」
t_en: "Thank you, dear outsiders! My servants have regained their sanity."

t_ch: 「众人啊！你们的旧主不会再归来，唯有因正道而互助，以真理相勉者，方能在彼此中收获完满！」
t_en: "Heed me, one and all! Your former master shall not return! It is through righteousness and unwavering support for one another that we shall attain true perfection!"

t_ch: 「战胜虚伪的幻影——拥入彼此的怀抱吧！」
t_en: "Cast aside the veils of hypocrisy! And embrace one another!"

t_ch: 准备好，想必又要开战了……
t_en: Get ready. Looks like another fight is about to begin...

t_ch: 这就是沉浸式戏剧吗…
t_en: Is this what they call "immersive theater"?

t_ch: 「可惜直到最后，他们仍是一群被赋予了自由权的奴隶。」
t_en: "Alas, they remain but slaves till the very end, with the illusion of freedom."

t_ch: 「至此便是第二幕。虚幻的谐乐中，『流放之地』逐渐走向『盛会之星』。」
t_en: "Thus concludes the second act. Amidst an illusory harmony, Land of the Exiles charted its course toward becoming the Planet of Festivities."

t_ch: 这是匹诺康尼逐步变为家族属地的过程，「同谐」到来后，流放之地发生了翻天覆地的变化，这些变化…并不全都是正面的。
t_en: This is how Penacony fell under The Family's control. Since the arrival of the Harmony, the land of the exiles has undergone dramatic changes, not all of which have proven... beneficial.

t_ch: 这个人戏真的好多，他们一家子都是老戏骨啊。
t_en: This guy really loves dramatic scenes. Bet he comes from a whole lineage of stage performers.

t_ch: 这回我总算听明白了，这最后一幕戏是要给「秩序」歌功颂德了。
t_en: Oh, I get it now. The last scene is all about singing the praises of the Order.

t_ch: 而这里的氛围…也和先前两个场景完全不同了。
t_en: And the atmosphere here... is completely different from the previous two scenes.

t_ch: 「如若没有一位君王，又有谁能为万民负责？」
t_en: "Without a king, who shall bear responsibility for the people?"

t_ch: 「若万民没有远视的双眼，我们便应做出他们的选择，并为之负责。」
t_en: "If the people lack foresight, we will make choices on their behalf and bear the responsibility."

t_ch: 「如若没有一位君王，谁庇护孱弱者，谁对抗横暴者？」
t_en: "Without a king, who shall protect the weak and stand against the mighty?"

t_ch: 「我们必当为庇护孱弱者而互助，正如我们必当为对抗横暴者而互助。」
t_en: "We shall support one another, protecting the weak and standing against the mighty."

t_ch: 「如若没有一位君王，谁能使星辰流转、潮汐涨落、万物生长？」
t_en: "Without a king, who shall govern the movement of stars, the ebb and flow of tides, and the growth of all things?"

t_ch: 「在君王出现前，它们各行其是；在君王离开后，它们依旧各行其是。」
t_en: "Before the arrival of a king, everything followed its natural course, and so it shall continue even after the king's departure."

t_ch: 「可送别君王后，谁来做新的君王呢？」
t_en: "But after the king's departure, who shall become the new king?"

t_ch: 「我们不再需要一位君王。我们本是超绝万物的君王。」
t_en: "We no longer have need for a king, for we have become kings of all things."

t_ch: 「我们不再需要一位君王。我们本是超绝万物的君王。」
t_en: "We no longer have need for a king, for we have become kings of all things."

t_ch: 嗯？按之前两幕戏，这里不该触发一段小故事，然后开始打架吗？怎么这些人偶都不说台词？
t_en: Hey? Aren't we supposed to kick off a short story and have a fight here just like we did in the previous acts? Why aren't any of these puppets saying anything?

t_ch: 也许和上一幕一样，需要我们亲手「完成」剧本。
t_en: Perhaps we'll need to "complete" the story ourselves just like we did before.

t_ch: 那…{NICKNAME}来看看，是不是他们也需要调整下情绪什么的。
t_en: So... {NICKNAME}? Do you think their mind needs tinkering or something?

t_ch: 「恭送您离开，旧日的君王。」
t_en: "Farewell, former king."

t_ch: 怎么样？顺利吗？
t_en: How did it go?

t_ch: 我改不了它的情绪…
t_en: I can't change the emotions...

t_ch: 改变不了？什么意思……
t_en: You can't change them? What does that mean...?

t_ch: 「请原谅我的失礼。忘了告诉诸位，唯有这最后一出戏——是早已写完的。」
t_en: "My apologies for my negligence. I forgot to inform you that the final part... was scripted long ago."

t_ch: 「就让我们过去的君王讲述给诸君吧。现在，该开始最后的仪式了。」
t_en: "Let our previous king recount it to you. Now, it is time for the final rite."

t_ch: 准备应战吧，看来我们又要打一场了。
t_en: Prepare for battle. Looks like we'll have to fight again.

t_ch: 「我留下难以察觉的痕迹，在一个静夜中走过。不必恒久地记住我，或追念梦的魂魄。」
t_en: "In the hushed expanse of a nocturnal reverie, I leave faint traces behind. No need to remember me or to recall the essence of dreams."

t_ch: 「属于我的必将衰落，而你会超越它的孱弱。」
t_en: "What is mine shall wane, while you shall transcend its delicate nature."

t_ch: 这是最后一幕了，倒是比先前的故事好懂许多…他要赶走「同谐」，建立一座「秩序」的帝国。
t_en: This is the final scene — it's much more straightforward... He wants to expel the Harmony and establish an empire based on the Order.

t_ch: 走吧。幕前剧结束后…就该是谐乐大典的重头戏了。
t_en: Let's go. Once this stage play concludes... it'll be time for the main event — the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 大剧院完全变样了…这就是「秩序」的力量吗？
t_en: This Grand Theater looks totally different... Is this the power of the Order?

t_ch: 各位，准备好。我们可能要面对一场恶战了。
t_en: Everyone, get ready. This could be a tough battle.

t_ch: 看！他就在那儿！
t_en: Look! There he is!

t_ch: 有关「秩序」的一切到此为止，不知各位有何感想？
t_en: That concludes everything related to the Order. What are your reflections on this, my dear guests?

t_ch: 不过，这到底只是银河历史中一段无足轻重的小插曲，并不重要，重要的是这条长河今后会奔向何方……
t_en: Nevertheless, this is but a trivial blip in the annals of galactic history. What truly matters is the course this river shall take in the days to come...

t_ch: 各位来的正是时候。谐乐大典即将揭幕，「{RUBY_B#「秩序」}同谐{RUBY_E#}」的序幕若是少了各位在场，那可太教人遗憾了。
t_en: You've arrived at the perfect moment. The Charmony Festival is about to commence, and it would be a shame if you were absent for {RUBY_B#The Order}the Harmony's{RUBY_E#} prologue.

t_ch: 请容我再次向各位表示欢迎——欢迎来到「匹诺康尼大剧院」——美梦的中心，星核之所在，谐乐大典的绝对舞台……
t_en: Allow me to extend my warmest welcome once more. Welcome to Penacony Grand Theater, the very core of the sweet dream, the abode of the Stellaron, the grand stage of the Charmony Festival...

t_ch: 也是…我们决定匹诺康尼未来的死斗之地。
t_en: And... the very place where the future of Penacony shall be determined through conflict.

t_ch: 更是你阴谋被挫败的地方。
t_en: And the very place where your schemes get smashed to smithereens.

t_ch: 我对你这份「开拓」的信念表示敬意。
t_en: Your unwavering faith in the Trailblaze is truly impressive.

t_ch: 你为何要向我们发出决斗邀请？
t_en: Why did you invite us to this duel?

t_ch: 因为我们的目标一致，你我为之奋斗的信念也有同等的分量。
t_en: Because our shared goals give equal weight to the beliefs we strive for.

t_ch: 星核在哪里？我怎么没看到？
t_en: Where is the Stellaron? Why am I not seeing it?

t_ch: 它就在帷幕之后，或者，你也可以认为它就是剧院本身。
t_en: It hides behind the curtain. Or rather, it is the theater itself.

t_ch: 不过，要想见到它，你们也必须向我展现与星核伟力相称的信念才行。
t_en: However, if you want to see it, you must display faith equal to its immense power.

t_ch: 惟有怀抱信念，我们才能为这个世界带来真正的福祉。
t_en: True goodness can only be achieved through faith.

t_ch: 请容我指出，陷入永久的沉睡绝不能和幸福画等号，尤其是人们还要在睡梦中任人摆布。
t_en: Allow me to point out that falling into a permanent slumber is not happiness, especially when those people are driven by someone else's will in their sleep.

t_ch: 姬子小姐，事到如今，您依旧认为「秩序」只想把全宇宙变作祂的提线木偶么？
t_en: Do you still believe that the Order only seeks to control the universe as THEIR puppet, Himeko?

t_ch: 哪怕你们描绘的乐园如何圆满，囚笼也依旧是囚笼。
t_en: No matter how perfect your vision of paradise may be, a cage remains a cage.

t_ch: 在那种世界里，人根本不可能获得真正的幸福！不过只是星神的玩具罢了！
t_en: People will never achieve true happiness in a world like that! They would just be toys for the Aeon!

t_ch: 看来各位始终误解了我的用意。在此正式敬告：我的理想并非复活星神，也非飞升成神——
t_en: It seems you have misunderstood my intentions. Allow me to clarify — My desire is not to resurrect a fallen Aeon or become one myself...

t_ch: 我要做的事只有一件，那就是创造一座没有星神，唯有「秩序」，能包容所有人尊严和幸福的，只属于我们人类的乐园。
t_en: My sole objective is to create a paradise free from Aeons, where the Order ensures the dignity and happiness of all humanity. A paradise exclusive to us human beings.

t_ch: 你错了。如果人要带着尊严活下去，那么，绝不应有任何人或事物凌驾于他们之上。
t_en: That's not the case. If people are to live with dignity, there must be nothing and no one above them.

t_ch: 而在你所谓的乐园里，这个人就是你。
t_en: In your so-called paradise, you would be the one reigning supreme.

t_ch: 看来我们无论如何也说服不了对方了。命运注定我们捉对厮杀，事已至此，还是让你我用各自的命途为宇宙昭示一条正路吧。
t_en: Looks like we won't be able to convince each other. Now that our conflict has been destined, let's unveil our Paths and reveal to the universe the true path.

t_ch: 不过，在未来的序曲正式奏响前，还烦请各位再花些时间思考我提出的问题——
t_en: However, before the prelude to the future begins, please take a moment to ponder the questions I've posed...

t_ch: 伤哉！有大伟力的星神……
t_en: How tragic! The Aeon with great might...

t_ch: 你以「秩序」为天地万物万民定义——
t_en: Under the banner of the Order, you have defined all things in the Cosmos...

t_ch: ——却令我等晓得自己不过是你的傀儡！
t_en: ...But this made us realize that we are but puppets in your hand!

t_ch: 普世同谐，群星共熠！
t_en: The world is in Harmony!

t_ch: 无上功德颂神主！
t_en: Praise the Great One!

t_ch: 上前觐见，行于死荫的迷途者！
t_en: O, lost souls! Come and meet your master!

t_ch: 「同谐」的化身？所以「谐乐大典」的真实目的…是要将其篡夺吗？
t_en: The embodiment of the Harmony? So, the true purpose of the Charmony Festival... is to usurp it?

t_ch: 诸位既智慧又敏锐，自然不难理解，为何「同谐」与「秩序」能够合二为一。
t_en: Wise and perceptive as you are... Answer me this — Why could the Harmony and the Order merge into one?

t_ch: 因为我等都无法容忍——「不协和音」！
t_en: Because neither side could tolerate... discord.

t_ch: 总感觉…眼前好像有另一个世界似的……
t_en: I'm feeling like... there's another world in front of my eyes...

t_ch: 是调律的力量…不要被歌声吸引注意力！
t_en: It's the power of tuning... Don't let the song distract you!

t_ch: 「欢迎来到乐园！」
t_en: Welcome to the paradise!

t_ch: 醒醒…醒醒……
t_en: Wake up... Wake up...

t_ch: …喂，{NICKNAME}！别睡啦，太阳晒屁股啦——
t_en: ...Hey, {NICKNAME}! Wake up! The sun's frying your butt!

t_ch: 你没事吧，听得清我说话吗？记不记得自己叫什么名字？
t_en: Are you all right? Can you hear me? Do you remember your name?

t_ch: 我…什么都不记得了。
t_en: I... don't remember anything.

t_ch: 那可麻烦了，能努力回忆一下吗？你的名字是……
t_en: Not good. Try to remember. Your name is...

t_ch: 好啦好啦，不开玩笑了。神君威力大是大，但也不至于把你弄失忆啦。看你状态不错，我放心咯。
t_en: Alright, alright, stop joking around. The Lightning-Lord may be all-powerful, but they're not going to cause sudden memory loss. I'm just glad you're okay.

t_ch: 这段台词怎么有点熟悉…
t_en: Why does that line sound so familiar...

t_ch: 嗯？有吗？我都不记得了。
t_en: Hmm? It does? Well, doesn't ring any bells to me.

t_ch: 看来你状态不错，还能记住这种细枝末节的事…那我放心咯。
t_en: Looks like your mind's still in one piece, if you're able to remember such details... Well that's reassuring.

t_ch: 太阳不是已经被我打下来了吗…
t_en: Didn't I shoot the sun out of the sky...

t_ch: 呃…在某种意义上，是景元将军帮咱们打下来的。
t_en: Uh... kind of, it was General Jing Yuan who helped us shoot it down.

t_ch: 不管怎么说，既然你还记得刚才发生的事…那我放心咯。
t_en: In any case, since you remember what happened just now... Well, that's put my mind at ease.

t_ch: 我昏迷期间发生了什么？
t_en: What happened while I was out?

t_ch: 这里是梦境还是现实？
t_en: Are we in the dream or reality?

t_ch: 嗯…说来话长。简单来说就是，丹恒在咱们陷入苦战的时候使用了结盟玉兆，带着将军及时解了围。
t_en: Mm... It's a long story. Simply put, Dan Heng used the jade abacus of allying oath when we were in the middle of a fierce battle, and summoned the general to help us just in time.

t_ch: 然后咱们就回到现实里来了。你看，这里是你的房间。
t_en: And then, we returned to reality. Look, this is your room.

t_ch: 大家也都从梦境里回来了，姬子他们正在大堂和将军谈事呢。既然你醒了，咱们就跟列车组的大伙报个平安吧，跟我来～
t_en: Everyone else has also returned from the Dreamscape. Himeko and the rest are at the lobby discussing matters with the general. Now that you're awake, we should tell the Crew that you're all right. Come with me!

t_ch: 嗨，我们又见面了，小瞌睡虫。
t_en: Hey, we meet again, sleepy head.

t_ch: 黑、黑天鹅小姐怎么在这儿？
t_en: Wh—What's Miss Black Swan doing here?

t_ch: 没什么，三月七小姐。我就是见{NICKNAME}醒了，想看看{M#他}{F#她}恢复得如何。
t_en: Nothing, Miss March. I noticed {NICKNAME} was awake and wanted to check to see how {M#he}{F#she} was doing.

t_ch: 将军那一击虽然援助及时，破坏力却也极强。令使的力量对撞在一起，普通人难免受到波及。
t_en: Though the strike from the General was timely, its destruction was also immense. When "Emanators" collide, ordinary people inevitably suffer.

t_ch: 不过，好在{RUBY_B#忆域}梦境{RUBY_E#}也算是我的主场…所幸在「齐响诗班」崩溃前把各位全送出来了。
t_en: But luckily for them, the {RUBY_B#Memory Zone}Dreamscape{RUBY_E#} is my home turf. Thankfully, I managed to get everyone out before the Harmonious Choir collapsed.

t_ch: 哦，原来是这样！谢谢你，黑天鹅小姐。
t_en: Oh, so that's what happened! Thank you, Miss Black Swan.

t_ch: 不客气，毕竟我也不想看到宝贵的「记忆」就此消失。你们是要去见同伴吧，介意我陪各位小走一程么？
t_en: Don't mention it, after all, I wouldn't want to see such precious memories vanish. You're heading to see your friends, aren't you? Would it bother you if I walked with you for a short while?

t_ch: 可以是可以…但你不会又像上次那样打什么歪主意吧？
t_en: Of course not... But you're not planning on doing something like last time, are you?

t_ch: 怎么会呢，我可从来没动过歪脑筋…至少在你们面前没有。
t_en: Why would you think that? I've never harbored any ill intentions... well, not when you were around, anyway.

t_ch: 你醒了，{NICKNAME}。感觉如何？
t_en: You're awake, {NICKNAME}. How do you feel?

t_ch: 哈，他小宝贝的！你一定就是他们说的那颗「星核」，对吧？
t_en: Well fork me! You must be that Stellaron they were talkin' about.

t_ch: 我没事，放心。
t_en: I'm fine. Thank you.

t_ch: 别担心，{NICKNAME}老早就活蹦乱跳啦。倒是你，丹恒，要不先给{M#他}{F#她}介绍一下这位牛仔是谁？
t_en: Don't worry, {NICKNAME}'s been up and about for a while now. But hey, Dan Heng, why don't you introduce this cowboy to {M#him}{F#her} first?

t_ch: 你怎么什么都说啊丹恒…
t_en: Dan Heng, why do you have to blab about everything...?

t_ch: 这…不是我说的。
t_en: I... didn't mention anything to him.

t_ch: 确实，{M#兄弟}{F#姐妹}你误会了，我是从忆者那儿听来的。
t_en: Pardner, you got it all wrong. I heard it straight from the Memokeeper.

t_ch: 你谁？怎么乱喊人宝贝？
t_en: Fork, huh? I myself prefer spooning.

t_ch: 让我来做个介绍吧。这位是波提欧，一位「巡海游侠」。
t_en: Allow me to introduce him to you: This is Boothill, a Galaxy Ranger.

t_ch: 我们在追缉某人的过程中偶然相识，正巧发现那位星期日先生在酝酿一桩惊天阴谋……
t_en: During our pursuit of a certain person, we crossed paths and just so happened to uncover a shocking plot being concocted by Mr. Sunday...

t_ch: 所以我们便找到你们，协助列车组的各位一起拯救世界了。
t_en: Which is why we sought you out, to help the Astral Express save the world together.

t_ch: 甭客气！咱们巡海游侠主打一个「路见不平拔刀相助」——丹恒兄弟，你们仙舟老话是这么讲的吧？
t_en: No need for thanks! The Galaxy Rangers' principle is "Correct every injustice one sees." That's how you lot on the Xianzhou put it, right, Dan Heng?

t_ch: 大意如此。
t_en: More or less.

t_ch: 哎，等一下，「追缉某人」这我倒是第一次听说…你们追谁能追列车上啊？
t_en: Wait. Hold on a sec. This is the first time I'm hearing about this "certain person"... Who are you chasing, and why would that lead you to the Express?

t_ch: 哈哈，问得好！那当然是……
t_en: Haha, good question! It's...

t_ch: 是谁来着？呃，丹恒兄弟，你还记得吗？
t_en: Who was it again? Uh, Dan Heng, do you remember?

t_ch: 这还要卖关子？
t_en: Come on, don't keep me in suspense.

t_ch: 好可疑…
t_en: IDK man you're looking kinda sus...

t_ch: 不，不是，我好像真想不起来了。怪事，脑机芯片也没故障啊……
t_en: Nah, that ain't it. I just can't seem to recall. Weird, my neuro chip hasn't registered any malfunctions...

t_ch: …我似乎也不记得了。
t_en: ...I can't seem to remember either.

t_ch: 啊这…怎么回事？
t_en: Uh... What's going on?

t_ch: 呃…嗐，算了算了！大家都想不起来说明那人八成是个小毛贼，不重要。反正不影响咱们几个理解前因后果。
t_en: Uh... heck, forget about it! If it's slipped all our minds, reckon that person was just a minor scoundrel, unimportant. Ain't gonna stop us from piecin' together the story anyhow.

t_ch: …嗯，等一切尘埃落定，我再想办法回忆域里追溯一番好了。
t_en: ...Yes, when the dust settles, I'll just think of a way to recall it in the Memory Zone.

t_ch: 各位，我们快去找姬子小姐吧？{NICKNAME}身为匹诺康尼的小明星，整个酒店可都在担心{M#他}{F#她}的安危呢。
t_en: Everyone, let's hurry up and look for Miss Himeko, shall we? {NICKNAME}'s now a minor star on Penacony, and the entire hotel's concerned about {F#her}{M#his} well-being.

t_ch: 唔，说得对，那我们这就去大堂吧。
t_en: You're right. Let's head to the lobby then.

t_ch: 呵呵，无妨。此间正是敌力角气之时，为万安计，我联盟理应代表星穹列车出面斡旋才是，绝不能让各位铤而走险。
t_en: Heh, that's alright. In these times of conflict, for the sake of utmost safety, it is only right that the Alliance steps forward to mediate on behalf of the Astral Express. We must not allow you to take unnecessary risks.

t_ch: 况且公司虽急于事功，但到底有「和平」之名在先；家族尽管进退无门，可也自称心向「和谐」。我联盟历来以理服人，相信双方定能捐弃前嫌，握手言和。
t_en: Furthermore, despite the IPC's eagerness for success, it prioritizes "peace" above all, and The Family, trapped though it may be, professes a desire for "Harmony." The Alliance has always won people over with reason. I firmly believe both parties can indeed put aside their differences and come to a peaceful agreement.

t_ch: 将军为人深明大义。能有仙舟联盟从中斡旋，匹诺康尼的和平指日可待。
t_en: The general possesses a deep understanding of the greater good. With the Xianzhou Alliance mediating, peace for Penacony is within reach.

t_ch: 愧不敢当！到底还是多亏了列车组的各位，否则这座美梦乐园还没等来和平，反教那群「秩序」残党捷足先登了……
t_en: You flatter me! But ultimately, it's been all down to the Express. Without your efforts, this Sweetdream Paradise would have been claimed by the last remnants of "Order" before there was even a shot at peace...

t_ch: 瞧，咱们的大功臣这不就来了么？
t_en: Well would you look at that. Here comes the big hero.

t_ch: 不敢当，不敢当。
t_en: It was nothing, really.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，不愧是「银河球棒侠」——侠之大者，虚怀若谷！
t_en: Hahaha, here's the Galactic Baseballer — the paragon of both heroism and humility!

t_ch: 应该的，应该的。
t_en: I do what I can.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，不愧是「银河球棒侠」——侠之大者，敢作敢当！
t_en: Hahaha, if it isn't the Galactic Baseballer — a true hero who dares to take action!

t_ch: 什么，在想我的事情？
t_en: Lemme guess, you were thinking about me... again?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，不愧是「银河球棒侠」——侠之大者，明察秋毫！
t_en: Hahaha, if it isn't the Galactic Baseballer — a hero with unparalleled insight!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，如何了？听说你始终不醒，身体可有不适？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, are you okay? I heard you couldn't wake up. Are you feeling unwell?

t_ch: 放心吧，杨叔，这家伙精神得很，一路上都快把{M#他}{F#她}这辈子能开的玩笑全开完了。
t_en: Don't worry, Mr. Yang. There's nothing wrong with {M#him}{F#her}, {M#he}{F#she} practically burned through a lifetime's worth of jokes on the way here.

t_ch: 倒是杨叔你怎么样了？听说那家伙连知更鸟小姐都没放过，把你们全都给关起来了……
t_en: What about you, Mr. Yang? I heard that even Miss Robin wasn't spared, and that guy locked you both up...

t_ch: 哎，说来话长…不过，那位星期日先生是个体面人，没有对我们两个下狠手。
t_en: It's a long story... but, at least Mr. Sunday took it easy on us.

t_ch: 他只是使用了一种名为「调律」的能力，将我们的意识和他自己连缀在一起。换句话说，他把我们囚禁在了意识中。
t_en: He used an ability called "tuning" to connect our consciousnesses with his. In other words, he imprisoned us within his consciousness.

t_ch: 多亏了景元将军击溃了「齐响诗班」，我们才能逃出生天。
t_en: Thanks to General Jing Yuan's destruction of the Harmonious Choir, we were able to escape.

t_ch: 啊，他也对我们用过那个…「调律」！这岂不是意味着，我们也差点惨遭囚禁……
t_en: Ah, he used that "tuning" on us, too! Does that mean that we were almost imprisoned as well...?

t_ch: 现在我可以确信，他确实是想和我们公平决斗。否则他当时完全有能力解决掉我们…不费吹灰之力。
t_en: I can confidently say now, he was truly after a fair fight with us. Had he wanted, he could have easily taken us down... without so much as lifting a finger.

t_ch: 说到这位橡木家系家主…他如今又在哪里？
t_en: Speaking of the Oak Family head... Where is he now?

t_ch: 很复杂，但一言以蔽之，他现在是前橡木家系家主了。
t_en: It's complicated, but in a nutshell, he's now the former Oak Family head.

t_ch: 公司指认他为家族在匹诺康尼分家的主要负责人，以威胁银河和平为由要求他代表家族为动乱负责，并将此案交由庇尔波因特审判……
t_en: The IPC has named him the key figure in The Family's Penacony split, citing a threat to Cosmic peace. He must represent The Family and answer for the unrest caused. His trial is set to take place at Pier Point.

t_ch: 但家族立刻将包括他在内的「秩序」残党打为敌人，坚称这场骚动是内部叛乱。如此一来，公司于情于理都无法介入「家族内务」了。
t_en: The Family quickly labeled him and the remnants of the Order as enemies, declaring the turmoil an internal rebellion. This move effectively barred the IPC from intervening in "Family affairs" on both moral and rational grounds.

t_ch: 还真是各有所图啊……
t_en: Everyone really has their own agenda after all...

t_ch: 那…知更鸟小姐会怎么样？她和星期日都和这场谐乐大典脱不了干系吧，还是亲兄妹……
t_en: Then... what's going to happen to Miss Robin? She and Sunday won't be able to deny their involvement in the Charmony Festival, they're siblings after all...

t_ch: 将军，怎么叹气啊……
t_en: Why the sigh, General?

t_ch: 只能说，这对那女孩实在是无妄之灾。我联盟在调停过程中会尽量说服家族对此事慎重裁夺的。
t_en: I can only say that this incident is an unexpected mess for the girl. The Alliance will try to persuade The Family to consider this matter carefully during mediation.

t_ch: 到时候了，各位。我与公司的各位要员约定就接下来的谈判先行磋商，不知各位是否有意前来旁听？
t_en: It's time, everyone. The IPC's key members and I have agreed to consult one another before the upcoming negotiation. Do any of you wish to sit in?

t_ch: 既然将军邀请，又事关宇宙大事，列车组自然不会拒绝。可要是公司方面对此不甚欢迎……
t_en: Given the general's invitation and the matter's significance to the universe, the Crew will naturally accept. However, if the IPC has any reservations...

t_ch: 怎么会，当然欢迎！他们表示各位是公司在匹诺康尼的可靠盟友，没有不欢迎的理由。
t_en: Why of course you're welcome! They've mentioned that your team is a trusted ally of the IPC in Penacony, so there's no reason not to welcome you.

t_ch: 况且，若是像星穹列车这般可靠的观察员在场，讨论想必一定能进展得更加顺利。怎样，各位意下如何？
t_en: Besides, if there can be reliable observers from the Astral Express present, discussions will go more smoothly. So, what do you all think?

t_ch: 那我们就恭敬不如从命了。
t_en: Well then, we shall oblige.

t_ch: 噫…本、本姑娘对这种场合有点过敏，我还是先回房间打包行李好了。
t_en: ...I'm a kind of allergic to those types of situations. I think I'll just head back to my room and start packing.

t_ch: 没关系，去吧。这里由我和姬子小姐出面就可以。
t_en: Not to worry. Himeko and I will take care of things.

t_ch: 我恐怕也要先一步回列车了。列车长很担心我们，我还是去说明一下现状为好。
t_en: I'm afraid I'll also have to return to the Express first. The conductor is worried about us. It's best I go and explain the situation.

t_ch: 嗯，拜托你了。{NICKNAME}，你呢？你想跟我和瓦尔特一起去，还是说你也有别的事要做？
t_en: Thank you. What about you, {NICKNAME}? Will you join Welt and me, or have you got other plans?

t_ch: 我和姬子小姐一起吧。
t_en: I'll go with Miss Himeko.

t_ch: 哈哈，这敢情好。
t_en: Haha, great.

t_ch: 我得帮三月七收拾行李…
t_en: I HAVE TO help March pack her suitcase...

t_ch: 呃…其实我一个人就可以收拾好啦……
t_en: What? I can pack it myself, you know...

t_ch: 哈哈，既然如此，那还是请我们的「银河球棒侠」一道来吧。
t_en: Haha, if that's the case, our Galactic Baseballer can join us.

t_ch: 直觉告诉我这里只有一种选择…
t_en: Dunno why, but something tells me I only have one real option here...

t_ch: 哈哈，猜得不错！
t_en: Haha, good guess!

t_ch: 虽然我不清楚个中缘由，但公司的代表们表示务必要让{NICKNAME}前来旁听——我为各位带路，这边请！
t_en: Although I'm not too sure of the reason, the representatives from the IPC have insisted on {NICKNAME}'s presence — allow me to lead the way, follow me please!

t_ch: 久违了，星穹列车的各位。
t_en: It's been a while, my Astral Express friends.

t_ch: 也向您致以诚挚的谢意，罗浮将军。能有各位在场共同见证，想必此次谈判一定能以令各方都满意的结果圆满落幕。
t_en: I would also extend my sincere thanks to you, General of the Luofu. The presence of everyone here assures that the talks will likely reach a conclusion that satisfies all sides.

t_ch: 哦？看来各位已经有所预期了。不妨说来听听？
t_en: Oh? Looks like everyone has come with expectations. Care to share?

t_ch: 当然。你来吧，托帕？
t_en: Of course. Topaz, if you please?

t_ch: 嗯，交给我吧。
t_en: Sure, leave it to me.

t_ch: 总的来说，是好消息——经过战略投资部「重大事务组」会议审议表决，以绝对多数成员同意通过了以下决议：
t_en: In summary, it's good news — after much deliberation from the Strategic Investment Department's council, the absolute majority of members have agreed to the following resolutions:

t_ch: 「基于对星际和平的长久考虑，经由庇尔波因特总部授权，战略投资部将代表公司永久放弃对匹诺康尼主权之宣称，并无条件支援家族对匹诺康尼的重建工作。」
t_en: "In light of long-term considerations for interastral peace, and by authority of Pier Point HQ, the Strategic Investment Department — on behalf of the Interastral Peace Corporation — will permanently relinquish its claim on Penacony sovereignty, and offer unconditional support of The Family's rebuilding efforts on Penacony."
Uh...

t_ch: 呵，有点意思。
t_en: Heh, now that's something.

t_ch: 公司的格局太大了！
t_en: So, the IPC does see the big picture, huh?

t_ch: 「一切为了和平」——这就是我司的基本价值观。
t_en: "All in the name of peace" — that's our motto.

t_ch: 这对你们有什么好处？
t_en: What's in it for you guys?

t_ch: 老实说对公司没有任何好处…但对全宇宙的长远发展却是非常有利的。
t_en: To be honest, it does nothing to benefit the IPC... but it is extremely beneficial to the long-term development of the entire universe.

t_ch: 那砂金岂不是白挨了一刀？
t_en: Doesn't that mean Aventurine took a hit for nothing?

t_ch: 哈哈，要是这样能为全宇宙带来和平，那也算值了。
t_en: Haha, if that's what it takes to bring peace to the entire universe, it's a price I'll gladly pay.

t_ch: 咳咳…这样人都到齐了帕。那我们现在开始航线会议吧！
t_en: Ahem... looks like everyone's present. Let the navigation meeting commence then!

t_ch: 是要决定下一站去哪儿的会呗？怎么说，投票还是？
t_en: This a meeting to decide on our next stop? How we doin' this, by show of hands?

t_ch: 别心急，牛仔。客随主便，交给他们定夺吧。
t_en: Hold your horses, cowboy. It's for those to decide.

t_ch: 波提欧，怎么还有你？
t_en: Boothill, why are you here?

t_ch: 嗐，搭个便车嘛，别紧张！
t_en: Hah, I'm just catching a lift. Don't sweat it!

t_ch: 黑天鹅，你怎么也在？
t_en: Black Swan, how come you're here too?

t_ch: 这对一位忆者来说不是很正常的事么？
t_en: Shouldn't this be expected of a Memokeeper?

t_ch: 你们都是从哪里来的？！
t_en: What in tarnation are you guys doing here?

t_ch: 让我来解释吧。波提欧先生和黑天鹅小姐出于各自需要，提出了想要暂时与列车组同行的请求……
t_en: Allow me to explain: Mr. Boothill and Miss Black Swan submitted a request to temporarily travel with the Express for their own personal reasons...

t_ch: 各位也知道，星穹列车向来不会拒绝任何心向远方的旅客。所以，他们接下来将和我们一起旅行一段时间，直到抵达目的地为止。
t_en: As you all may also know, the Astral Express never declines any passenger whose heart yearns for the distant stars. Therefore, they will be traveling with us for a while, until they reach their destinations.

t_ch: 喔…这下列车里要热闹起来了。不过，黑天鹅小姐，你可不能在列车里用忆者的能力恶作剧哦！
t_en: Whoa... The Express is going to be much livelier now. But Miss Black Swan, you'd better not use your Memokeeper abilities to pull any pranks!

t_ch: 好啊，三月七小姐。我答应你，休息时间里你绝对不会在自己的房间里看见我。
t_en: Understood, Miss March. I promise you, you'll never see me in your room while you're taking a break.

t_ch: 噫…不要吓我呀……
t_en: Uhm... Don't, you're freaking me out...

t_ch: 好了，好了。既然各位乘客都相互认识过了，那我们就继续航线会议了帕！
t_en: All right. All right. Now that everyone's met everyone, we can continue our navigation meeting!

t_ch: 希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事……
t_en: Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful...

t_ch: 希望这次旅行平安无事…
t_en: Please let this trip be uneventful...

t_ch: 你怎么这么喜欢学我说话呀！
t_en: What's with you and always copying the way I talk!

t_ch: 你在碎碎念什么？
t_en: What are you mumbling about?

t_ch: 什么叫碎碎念，我这叫祈祷！
t_en: Mumbling!? I'm praying!

t_ch: 唉，最近几次开拓之旅都太吓人了，动不动就有性命之忧…也该来点轻松愉快温暖人心的可爱冒险了吧！
t_en: The last couple of trailblazing expeditions have been downright terrifying... It's about time we had some fun, cozy, and cute adventures for a change!

t_ch: 你也来，快和我一起祈祷！希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事……
t_en: Come on, start praying with me! ! Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful...

t_ch: 不知怎么，突然和你有一种…「好久不见」的感觉。
t_en: For some reason, I'm suddenly stricken by the feeling that... we haven't crossed paths in quite some time.

t_ch: 也确实好久没见了。
t_en: It has indeed been a while.

t_ch: 大概…「久别重逢的喜悦」，也算是「开拓」的一部分吧。
t_en: Perhaps... the joy of reuniting after a long time can also be considered just another part of the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 我在心里时时念着你。
t_en: You're always in my heart.

t_ch: 哎…我就不该期待你说出什么正经的话。
t_en: ...I should have known better than to expect anything serious from you.

t_ch: 到了目的地，你要一起下车哦！
t_en: This time, you must disembark with us when we reach our destination!

t_ch: 知道了。
t_en: Got it.

t_ch: 这星穹列车倒真是挺舒服的…但，我就一个小意见啊，你们列车上咋没啥*带劲的*饮料啊？
t_en: This Astral Express sure is comfy... but, I got one tiny problem with it. How come there ain't no potent drinks on this ride?

t_ch: 没有麦芽果汁也就算了，好歹来点别的嘛！比如「白宝石」之类稀烂贱的牌子，又不贵。
t_en: I can live without malt juice, but at least stock somethin' else! Like that "White Gem," common as dirt and not too pricey.

t_ch: 不行！我们是<unbreak>12</unbreak>+列车！
t_en: No way! Our express is only rated <unbreak>12</unbreak>+!

t_ch: 那你也不能用<unbreak>12</unbreak>岁的标准要求我这样一个精壮的游侠啊！
t_en: You can't use that <unbreak>12</unbreak>-years-of-age rule against a mighty Ranger like me!

t_ch: 姬子的咖啡还不够上头吗？
t_en: Is Himeko's coffee not strong enough for you?

t_ch: 呃…那是不同意义的「上头」……
t_en: Uh, well... That's a different kind of "strong"...

t_ch: 我帮你问问列车长吧。
t_en: I'll help you ask the conductor.

t_ch: 谢了！{M#哥们}{F#姐们}！来点便宜的就行，我不挑嘴的。
t_en: Thanks, {M#brother}{F#sister}! Any low-cost swill will do, I ain't fussy.

t_ch: 哈，这些年我都风餐露宿惯了，现在突然让我住到这么好的地方…啧，还挺不错的。
t_en: Ha, all these years out in the wild, and now I'm bunkin' in luxury... Gotta say, it's quite the treat.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你已经是一个越来越优秀的开拓者了。能见证你的成长，我非常欣慰。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're fast becoming an excellent Trailblazer. It's an honor to be able to watch you grow.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，过奖了。
t_en: Hee-hee, stop flattering me.

t_ch: 不必谦虚，你的成长大家都有目共睹。我以前认识非常多的战士，能像你一样成长的人，在我的故乡…至少要评为S级吧。
t_en: Don't downplay your achievements, everyone has witnessed your growth. I've known many warriors in my time, and only a few achieve the kind of growth you have. Back home, where I'm from you'd be rated at least an S-tier.

t_ch: 我超厉害的！
t_en: Yup, I'm super-duper awesome!

t_ch: 是啊，你超厉害的。我以前认识非常多的战士，能像你一样成长的人，在我的故乡…至少要评为S级吧。
t_en: Yes, yes, you are. I've known many warriors in my time, and only a few achieve the kind of growth you have. Back home, where I'm from you'd be rated at least an S-tier.

t_ch: 这段时间辛苦你了。好好休息一下吧，我很期待你在下一场旅程中的表现。
t_en: It's not been easy for you these past few days. You've earned some downtime. I'm looking forward to seeing how you'll perform on our next journey.

t_ch: 说起来，{NICKNAME}，匹诺康尼这次，还是你第一次和我一起开拓吧？
t_en: Come to think of it, {NICKNAME}, this trip to Penacony was the first time we Trailblazed together, wasn't it?

t_ch: 希望以后还能和你一起开拓！
t_en: I hope we can Trailblaze together again someday.

t_ch: 放心吧。我们能在列车上一起相处的时间还有很长，这样的机会也一定不会少的。
t_en: Don't worry. We'll have plenty of time to spend together on the Express, so there'll definitely be more chances for adventures like this.

t_ch: 这太危险了，真希望你没下去。
t_en: It was too dangerous. I wish you hadn't gone down.

t_ch: 好啦～我明白你担心。但没关系，我可也是个顶天立地的无名客，不会有事的。
t_en: It's alright! I understand your concern, but it's okay. I'm also a capable Nameless, just like yourself.

t_ch: 今天早些休息吧。这段时间你太累了，若是不趁这个机会好好修养精神，可是会落下病根的…你现在年轻还好，老了以后可是要遭罪的哦。
t_en: Turn in early today. You've really been pushing yourself hard recently. If you don't take this chance to recharge, it could lead to long-term problems... It seems fine when you're young, but it's a different story as you age.

t_ch: 哦？你来啦，{NICKNAME}。你的倒影映在舷窗里的繁星之间…呵呵，有点教人看不真切呢。
t_en: Oh? You're here, {NICKNAME}. Seeing your reflection among the stars in the porthole... really does seem somewhat surreal.

t_ch: 怎么样，这趟美梦之旅…可还令你满意？
t_en: How about it, this journey of beautiful dreams... Was it to your liking?

t_ch: 跌宕起伏，非常满意，多来点！
t_en: What a rollercoaster ride! It's just... so peak... Keep it coming!

t_ch: 我能感受到你喜悦的心情…如此一来，你的记忆也会变得非常美妙呢。
t_en: I can feel your obvious excitement... That means your memories will also become even more beautiful.

t_ch: 有点意犹未尽就是了…
t_en: It kind of left me wanting more, you know...

t_ch: 这种略带遗憾和落寞的情绪…嗯，这种回味悠长的记忆我也很喜欢哦。
t_en: That tinge of regret I sense... Ah, these are the kinds of lasting memories I cherish.

t_ch: 感觉很多东西还没讲清楚？
t_en: Seems like there are still lotsa loose ends, no?

t_ch: 好奇心的气息非常浓郁啊…这种记忆会令人欲罢不能呢。
t_en: There's a rich scent of curiosity here... Such memories can be irresistibly captivating.

t_ch: 太机械降神了！
t_en: It's nothing short of a deus ex machina!

t_ch: 呀，真是好激烈的情感…呵呵，让人直冒汗，却也欲罢不能。
t_en: Ah, such an intense emotion... Heh, makes you break out in a sweat, but you just can't get enough.

t_ch: 下次还填非常简单。
t_en: When the next survey comes, I'll be checking the "Too Easy" box... AGAIN.

t_ch: 哦？如此捉摸不透的情绪…这种记忆倒是第一次遇见，有点勾起我的好奇心了。
t_en: Oh? Such elusive emotions... I've never encountered memories quite like this before, it's stirred my curiosity.

t_ch: 那…就把那件「小小的临别礼物」还给我吧？我已经迫不及待了。
t_en: So... How about you hand that "small parting gift" back to me? I'm quite eager to have it back.
Mm...

t_ch: 发生什么事了？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 不是这张牌吗？
t_en: It's not this card?

t_ch: 我…我可没弄坏它…
t_en: I... I wasn't the one who broke it...

t_ch: 嗯，没什么……
t_en: Hmm, never mind...

t_ch: 我只是…在你的「记忆」中发现了一处非常有趣的地方。
t_en: I just... stumbled upon a particularly fascinating spot in your memory.

t_ch: 在向你道出缘由前…我要向你道歉，{NICKNAME}。其实我给你的这份「临别礼物」并非忆域的罗盘…而不过是一枚<color=#dbc291ff>「空光锥」</color>而已。
t_en: Before I explain... I would like to apologize to you, {NICKNAME}: This farewell gift I gave you isn't really a compass from the Memory Zone... but merely an <color=#dbc291ff>empty Light Cone</color>.

t_ch: 还记得我们初入梦境酒店时，我向你的伙伴分别索取了几样饰品么？它们的功能是类似的。
t_en: Remember when we entered the hotel in the Dreamscape for the first time, and I procured a few trinkets from your companions? Their functions are similar.

t_ch: 这样，我就可以随时感应到你，以便在你遇到危险的时候及时出手了。
t_en: This way, I can always be attuned to your location, ready to assist immediately if you encounter any threats.

t_ch: 但…那并不是它最本质的功能。
t_en: But... this is not its most intrinsic function.

t_ch: 「光锥」是用于封装{RUBY_B#记忆}凝固事象{RUBY_E#}的光之切片，这枚空光锥也一样。
t_en: Light Cones are slices of light used to encapsulate {RUBY_B#Remembrance}solidified phenomena{RUBY_E#}. This empty Light Cone is the same.

t_ch: 它能够将你的记忆以最鲜活的形式刻录下来，然后…为我欣赏把玩，成为独一无二的回忆。
t_en: It can etch your memories in their most vivid form, and then... allow me to admire and manipulate them, turning them into unique mementos.

t_ch: 世间万物皆出自精神和灵性的力量——这力量正是「记忆」。要想使我们免于被世界遗落在身后，便要让世界记住我们…或者，用我们的「记忆」重塑世界。
t_en: All the world is born from the power of mind and soul, and that power is "memory." To prevent ourselves from being forgotten by the world, we must make the world remember us... or, use our memories to recreate it.

t_ch: 人生看似漫长，却也只能提取出不过寥寥数份饱含力量的记忆：或欢欣、或悲伤，或轻快、或沉重…但你不一样，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Life, seemingly vast, offers but a scant collection of impactful memories: Some joyful, some sorrowful, some light, some heavy... But you, {NICKNAME}, are different.

t_ch: 「记忆」是未来的倒影。从那倒影中，我能看到你独一无二的价值。你能创造出令世界为之倾倒的回忆…你的记忆能够映照出宇宙未来的方向。
t_en: Memory is a reflection of the future. Within that reflection, I see your unparalleled worth. You have the power to craft memories that can captivate the world... Your memory can illuminate the universe's future path.

t_ch: 而那记忆…将要璀璨得如同这舷窗中举目可见的点点繁星。
t_en: And that memory... will be as scintillating as the star clusters you see in this porthole.

t_ch: 所以你想收藏我的记忆？
t_en: Which is why you want to collect my memories?

t_ch: 正是。不过，你知道更深层的原因是什么吗？
t_en: Precisely. But, do you know the deeper meaning behind it?

t_ch: 说得我都有点脸红了…
t_en: You're making me blush...

t_ch: 真可爱。不过，你知道我这么做更深层的原因是什么吗？
t_en: How adorable. But, do you know the deeper meaning behind it?

t_ch: 帮我看看，我是不是要飞升了？
t_en: Help me take a look, am I about to ascend?

t_ch: 我手中与你有关的记忆还太少，远不能助我占卜太过遥远的未来。
t_en: The memories I have of you are not enough for me to predict a future that lies too far ahead.

t_ch: 不过，我可以告诉你一件事，那就是我对你如此青睐有其更深层的原因。
t_en: But, I can tell you one thing: My favor towards you stems from a more profound reason.

t_ch: 理由很简单——<color=#dbc291ff>在家族这场盛大而浮华的梦里，只有你亲历了全程</color>。
t_en: The reason is simple: <color=#dbc291ff>In this grandiose and ostentatious dream of The Family's, only you personally experienced the entire course</color>.

t_ch: 这意味着什么？
t_en: What does that mean?

t_ch: 别说谜语啦！
t_en: Stop speaking in riddles!

t_ch: 别心急。我会揭晓答案的…只是现在不是时候。
t_en: Patience, my friend. I will reveal the answer to you... but that time is not now.

t_ch: 回头看看你的朋友们吧。他们每个人都在为下一个目的地欢欣鼓舞，对各自的现在与未来充满了期待。要是现在就道破一切，岂不是太扫兴了么？
t_en: Turn around and take a look at your friends. Every one of them is reveling at the arrival of their next destination, all filled with hopes and expectations of their own present and future. Revealing everything at this moment would be a bit of a buzzkill, wouldn't it?

t_ch: 我想要挑一个好的时候，一个你完全放松的时候…或许，夜色每一次模糊，你每一次行将入睡的时刻正是最合适的。
t_en: I'm looking for an opportune time, a time when you're totally at ease... Perhaps, when the night grows hazy, and you're about to drift off would be the most opportune.

t_ch: 不如就挑个夜晚吧。我会备好烛光、香氛，还有软榻，为你打造一个舒适的梦乡。然后，我就把那答案当做一个小小的睡前故事说给你听，哄你入睡……
t_en: How about one fine night? I will prepare the candles, aromatics, and even a cushy couch to create a cozy dream land for you. And then, I will tell you the answer in the form of a little bedtime story to lull you to sleep...

t_ch: 喂——喂喂——各位乘客请注意——
t_en: Ahem, hi, hello~ Attention all passengers.

t_ch: 列车即将跃迁——列车即将跃迁——请坐稳扶好帕——！
t_en: The Express is about to make the jump — please be seated and hold on!

t_ch: 呵呵，看来我们终于要出发了。远方还有那么多闪耀的记忆在等待着我们…就先聊到这里吧？
t_en: Heh, it looks like we're finally about to set off. There are countless gleaming memories out there waiting for us... Why don't we just leave it at that for now?

t_ch: 啊，对了。作为对用那枚「空光锥」戏弄了你的小小补偿，我想送你一句话。它对我有着十分重要的意义……
t_en: Ah, that's right. As a small token of compensation for playing that little trick on you with the empty Light Cone, I will gift you with some words — they hold great significance to me...

t_ch: 「生命是一座迂回的迷宫，除了记忆，我们一无所有。」
t_en: "Life is akin to a winding labyrinth, where memories serve as our sole companions."

t_ch: 你可一定要好好地记在心里哦？
t_en: You'll remember these words dearly, won't you?

t_ch: 琥珀历<unbreak>2158</unbreak>纪，纪元的第一年，宇宙再次回到它应行的轨道上。阴谋的火种在「梦想之地」匹诺康尼闷烧，尚未成燎原之势，便成为克里珀铁砧上的一簇火花，转瞬即逝。
t_en: In the year <unbreak>2158</unbreak> of the Amber Era, the first year of the new epoch, the universe resumed its intended trajectory. The kindling of conspiracy smoldered in Penacony, the Land of the Dreams. Failing to erupt into a blaze, it instead flickered briefly on Qlipoth's anvil, before vanishing in the blink of an eye.

t_ch: 应死者和已死者照旧沉眠，生者也得以酣睡。所有人都在用沉默大声喧哗，并各行其是。银河焕发出每一个纪元之初应有的活力，代价不过是一对兄妹轻微的悲伤。
t_en: The dead and those fated to die remain in their eternal slumber, while the living find solace in deep sleep. All clamored in a cacophony of silence, and then went about their own ways. The cosmos emanated a vitality characteristic of a new era, all for the modest price of a brother and sister's mild grief.

t_ch: 婴儿在诞生，恒星在熄灭。银轨在铺展。星穹列车的故事既告一段落，也重新开始。
t_en: Babies are born as stars extinguish. The silver rail unfolds. The story of the Astral Express comes to a close, yet it also embarks anew.

t_ch: 时间滚滚向前，而「开拓」之旅亦将翻开新的篇章。
t_en: Time marches forward, heralding the arrival of a new chapter in the history of Trailblazing expeditions.

t_ch: 无数流星划过今夜的天空…如果选中了正确的那一颗，它将把你的愿望，带向千百个世界。
t_en: Countless shooting stars streak the sky tonight... If you can pick the right one, it will carry your wish to thousands of distant worlds.

t_ch: 你现在感到十分放松了，对吧？那么……
t_en: You're feeling very relaxed now, aren't you? So then...

t_ch: 现在，是时候为你讲一个<color=#dbc291ff>小小的睡前故事</color>了。
t_en: It's time to tell you <color=#dbc291ff>a little bedtime story</color>.

t_ch: 先说结论吧：<color=#dbc291ff>在与星期日的对抗中，列车组的各位、乃至匹诺康尼的所有人都失败了，无人生还</color>。
t_en: Well, let's start with the conclusion — <color=#dbc291ff>The Crew was defeated in the battle against Sunday. Everyone in Penacony failed, and no one survived</color>.

t_ch: 不过别紧张，事实尽管骇人，但还未到无可挽回的地步。各位仍有一线生机，而我正是为此而来。
t_en: But don't panic. The truth, as horrifying as it may be, is not yet irreversible. There's still a glimmer of hope, and that's why I'm here.

t_ch: 接下来，我将用这张记录了你全部记忆的「空光锥」，为你重新讲述此前发生的一切。而当故事的尾声来临时，相信聪明的你一定会发现……
t_en: Next, I'll use this empty light cone that carries all your memories to relive everything that happened before. And when this story reaches its end, I'm sure someone as clever as you will notice that...

t_ch: 在你亲身经历的这段故事中，存在一处<color=#dbc291ff>致命的破绽</color>——而那一线生机，就藏在这破绽的背后。
t_en: There's a <color=#dbc291ff>major flaw</color> in the story you have experienced, yet within that flaw lies a glimmer of hope.

t_ch: 那么，准备好了么？
t_en: Are you ready for it?

t_ch: 还记得吗？当时钟的指针拨回起点，列车启动跃迁，将你送入一场陌生的梦境。虽然摸不着头脑，但那位巡海游侠「黄泉」为你指明了出路。
t_en: Do you remember everything? When the clock turned back, the Express started a warp jump, sending you to a strange dream. You were bewildered back then, and then a Galaxy Ranger named Acheron showed you a way out.

t_ch: 你们抵达「白日梦」酒店，在这里<color=#dbc291ff>遇到了门童米沙</color>，还与公司使节砂金起了冲突。所幸黄泉小姐再次路过，才让你及时脱身。
t_en: When you arrived at The Reverie Hotel, you <color=#dbc291ff>met the</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>bellboy</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>doorman</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>Misha</color> and had a confrontation with Aventurine, an IPC representative. Thankfully, Acheron appeared again and helped you.

t_ch: 随后，你在梦境里救下流萤小姐，与她一起游览了匹诺康尼。你们中途遭遇<color=#dbc291ff>假扮成桑博的花火</color>，意外坠入了稚子的梦。
t_en: After that, you saved Firefly and explored Penacony together. During the tour, you ran into <color=#dbc291ff>Sparkle disguised as Sampo</color> and accidentally entered a child's dream.

t_ch: 我从「死亡」手中救下二位，可流萤小姐却没能返回现实。她察觉到真相，想要邀你入局，却促成了一起意外的「死亡」。而更可怕的是，你很快便撞上了另一起命案。
t_en: There, I rescued both of you from "Death," but Firefly didn't return to reality. She realized the truth and tried to involve you in her plan, but that resulted in an accidental "death." Even more unsettling, you soon encountered another "murder."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>两起「死亡」</color>促使你们决定调查美梦背后的真相。你们想从二人的信息入手，却不得要领，反倒从加拉赫那里得知了有关「钟表匠」的情报。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The two cases of "death"</color> prompted you to investigate the truth behind the sweet dream. Despite your efforts to gather information about the two victims, you didn't make much progress. But you did learn about the Watchmaker from Gallagher.

t_ch: 与此同时，砂金也在暗中筹备自己的计划，你们被他选为计划的推力。黄泉小姐在激战中拔刀，迫不得已<color=#dbc291ff>暴露了「虚无」令使的身份</color>。
t_en: Meanwhile, Aventurine was secretly carrying out his scheme, in which you were one of the pawns. In the midst of a fierce battle, Acheron <color=#dbc291ff>revealed her true identity as an Emanator of the Nihility</color> and unsheathed her sword.

t_ch: 这一击不仅将砂金击落，也撕开了美梦与原初忆域的通道。你们抵达流梦礁，得知了<color=#dbc291ff>「死亡」实为「沉眠」</color>，更得知了梦境、星核乃至门童米沙的真相。
t_en: That strike foiled Aventurine's plan and opened a passage between the sweet dream and the original Memory Zone. Upon your arrival at Dreamflux Reef, you learned the truth that <color=#dbc291ff>"Death" was actually "Dormancy"</color>, as well as the truth about the Dreamscape, the Stellaron, and the bellboy, Misha.

t_ch: 你们和星期日、知更鸟决定分头寻找封印星核的方法。谁曾想，星期日与「梦主」早就另有图谋，你们终究不得不在谐乐大典的舞台上一决生死。
t_en: You split up with Sunday and Robin, looking for a way to seal the Stellaron. However, it turned out that Sunday and the Dreammaster had their own hidden agenda, and you had to engage in an ultimate duel on the stage of the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 终于，故事来到了尾声。你们战胜了他，「开拓」压倒「秩序」，匹诺康尼也得以迎接光明与和平的未来……
t_en: Finally, the story reached its conclusion. You emerged victorious, with the Trailblaze triumphing over the Order and Penacony embracing a bright and peaceful future...

t_ch: 至此，如梦似幻、跌宕起伏的匹诺康尼之旅到此为止了。想必你已经有所察觉了，对吧？
t_en: This marks the end of the thrilling journey in Penacony. I'm sure you've already noticed something unusual, haven't you?

t_ch: 那一处与已知信息截然相悖的<color=#dbc291ff>致命破绽</color>，就出现在这部分故事里——
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The major flaw</color>, which contradicts all the known information, hides in this story...

t_ch: 在酒店与米沙初次相遇…
t_en: My first encounter with Misha at the hotel...

t_ch: 呵呵，小米沙…或者现在应该称呼他为「钟表匠」先生？
t_en: Heh, little Misha... or should I call him the Watchmaker?

t_ch: 他身为梦泡中的记忆，却因为心怀「开拓」之志离开了梦泡，竟然还在匹诺康尼开展了一段大冒险……
t_en: He is only a segment of memory in a dream bubble, but his ambition for the Trailblaze led him to leave the bubble and embark on a grand adventure in Penacony...

t_ch: 可惜这位小米沙说到底也不过是个特别的忆域迷因。就算「开拓」的力量再怎么让他神通广大，唯独一件事是他无论如何也做不到的——
t_en: While Misha is a rather special Memory Zone Meme, and he was granted power by the Trailblaze... there's still one thing that he shouldn't be able to do—
